title: Create: Ratatouille Fried Delights
description: A expansion to Create: Ratatouille, more food and processing!
body:
# Description

**Create: Ratatouille Fried Delights** is an expansion mod for [create : ratatouille](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ratatouille), bringing the fast-food spirit to the world of Minecraft! 🍟🍗🥤

Craft and enjoy a variety of fast-food favorites — crispy fries, juicy chicken drumsticks, sweet desserts, and fizzy drinks like cola!

## Main Content

**🍔 Build Your Own Burger**
Create your dream burger, layer by layer, with a fully customizable assembly system. Every ingredient, every sauce — it’s all up to you. No limits!!!

**🍟 Dip & Delight System**
Who doesn’t love dipping fries in ketchup? Or honey? Customize your dipping experience with our sauce system!

**⚙️ New Machines**
Experience two new machines designed in the Create style:

**Continuous Fryer** – belt frying system

**Drum Processor** – a rotating drum for rolling production

Fire up your kitchen, automate your fryer, and bring the fast-food revolution to your factory!
![RataFry Kitchen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xG1YXmVZ/images/d514261802bd76625b5ecf477b7f95c2d3ee3c73.png)
